content.en:
"More than a hundred drops of Heavenly Blood True Liquid, it is estimated that there is no way for me to raise my cultivation to the middle stage of the Quadruple Dao Realm, but at least it can save a lot of cultivation time. If you kill another batch of Supreme Dao Void Demons and absorb the gifts of the Heaven and Earth Origin, then you will probably be able to step into the middle of the Fourfold Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The days that followed.

Ye Tian's re-copied true body copy body continued to hunt the Supreme Dao Void Demon, he knew that he was being targeted, so he wrapped his whole body with the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao rules, and also urged all kinds of Supreme Dao weapons that hid himself.

In such a situation, it would be difficult for the Void Demons to locate him.

After learning about the Heavenly Blood Battlefield's Supreme Dao Void Demon Strength, he knew that he would not be able to sweep here, unless his cultivation could reach the Fifth Rank Supreme Dao Realm, and he had to comprehend the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao rules before he could truly sweep here.

The higher the cultivation, even if you take the path of the strongest to the Dao, you will not be able to cross the three great realms.

For example, the Taibai Sword Master, the sixfold to the peak of the Dao Realm, there is no way to sweep the Eightfold to the Dao Realm, and some terrifying Eightfold to the Dao Realm can kill the Taibai Sword Lord.

The Taibai Sword Master could only bully and bully the Wuji Heavenly Emperor.

The years passed.

Ye Tian continued to hunt the Dao Void Demon, and although he was besieged by the Dao Void Demon several times, he left calmly.

As a result, not a single fall.

It's also better this way, at least your hole cards are not exposed.

this day.

Ye Tian once again accumulated a million battle merits, came to the Heavenly Blood Hall to exchange for the Heavenly Blood True Liquid, and exchanged more than a hundred drops of the Heavenly Blood True Liquid.

However, refining these Heavenly Blood True Liquids, he also did not raise his cultivation to the realm of the middle stage of the Quadruple Dao Realm.

"The cost performance of blood true liquid this day is really too ordinary, no wonder there is no Dao realm to redeem!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he has also accumulated a lot of heaven and earth gifts, and he is ready to consume them this time, maybe he will be able to break through his cultivation to the middle realm of the fourfold Dao realm.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tianyinian accepted the gift of the Heavenly Emperor's origin.

Rumble!!!!

A large amount of heaven and earth origin gifts poured into Ye Tian's body, refining his body again and again.

Gradually, Ye Tian's cultivation reached the peak realm of the early stage of the Quadruple Dao Realm, and he sprinted towards the shackles of the middle stage.

I don't know how long it has been, the bottleneck has been torn apart, and Ye Tian's cultivation has officially stepped into the middle realm of the Fourfold Dao Realm.

"The strength has increased a little, but not much!"

The improvement of the small realm will naturally not increase much in strength, unless he comprehends the rules of the sixth sequence of the supreme path, he can make his strength skyrocket.

But it's too hard!

Even the Taibai Sword Master hadn't comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and he couldn't do it if he wanted to.

If the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules were so easy to comprehend, the Eightfold Dao Realm would not be so rare, and the Heavenly Dragon Domain would be relatively strong, but it would only be three Eightfold Dao Realm.

this day.

A piece of news came that the Heavenly Blood Dragon Crystal vein appeared in Long Zehai on the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, and it was not small.

As a result, the Dao Realms on the Heavenly Blood Battlefield all rushed to Long Zehai.

"It's time to start a big war!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Many Supreme Dao realms don't want to participate in such a big war, but it's not okay if they don't go, and if they don't go, their families and relatives in the outside world will be unlucky.

In addition, the Heavenly Dragon Domain has also doubled its combat exploits, so many Supreme Dao Realms are ready to fight.

Whew!!

Many Sixfold Dao Realms have been dispatched, such as Long Wu, Long Xu and other Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon Realms on the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List.

Of course, it is not possible to appear in all of them, many of the Supreme Dao Realms are in the outside world, and they are not in the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, and it is very good to be able to gather more than thirty Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon Lists to the Dao Realm on the entire battlefield.

No one is going to stay here forever.

Similarly, the same is true for the Supreme Dao Void Demons on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List, not all of them are on the Heavenly Blood Battlefield.

Long Zehai.

The Heavenly Dragon Domain to the Dao Realm collided with the Dao Void Demons, and they fought directly.

Then.

Blood Chaos has his eyes on Long Wu, and he is ready to kill Long Wu.

When Long Wu saw the blood chaos, his face immediately changed.

But at this moment, a fifth-fold supreme realm stopped the blood chaos.

This peerless genius of the Fivefold Supreme Dao Realm is the Heavenly Dragon Domain's path to the strongest Dao - Dragon Ba!

Long Ba is also very demonic, and he has also received the seventh sequence of supreme rules, although the realm is not as high as Ye Tiangao, but the cultivation is high!

Therefore, in terms of strength, he is still above Ye Tian.

"Dragon Tyrant!"

Blood Chaos was a little jealous, but it was just jealousy.

"Kill!"

Bloodstream and Dragonlord have fought each other.

......

With so many Supreme Dao Realms fighting with Supreme Dao Void Demons, Ye Tian was completely inconspicuous among them.

So, he had to kill a wave of Dao Void Demons first.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian directly enveloped the Supreme Dao Void Demon in an area, and the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao rules exploded, casting a large-scale seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao Divine Power - Heaven and Earth Secret Net!

This is the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao Divine Power specially prepared by him in order to kill the Dao Void Demon, which is useless to the strong who exist in the same existence, but it is very useful to slaughter the weak.

Airplanes!

Dense meshes appeared in heaven and earth, and each mesh contained the power of the seventh sequence of supreme rules.

These Supreme Dao Void Demons were all wrapped and strangled in an instant.

In this wave, tens of thousands of Dao Void Demons were killed.

"Big money!"

Ye Tian was excited.

Who made these supreme path void demons too dense, they usually don't have such an opportunity!

"Look for death!"

A Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon angrily slaughtered Ye Tian.

"It's another powerhouse on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List, the fifty-sixth Blood Peng!"

This Blood Peng is much more powerful than that Blood Star, but compared to Ye Tian, it is still weaker.

Bang!!!

Ye Tian and Xuepeng fought, and he fought for his life at the beginning, which made Xuepeng startled.

"Maniac!"

Xue Peng commented.

Moreover, he had to admit that Ye Tian was indeed very demonic, and he had actually comprehended the seventh sequence of the Dao rules to the realm of ten percent.

In terms of strength, he is not an opponent.

Soon.

Blood Peng was injured, and the injury was not light. 、

"Come and help me!"

Blood Peng asked for help.

Rumble!!!!

Six Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons came over to assist Blood Peng, although they are not the Supreme Dao Void Demons on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List, their strength is not weak, and the six of them combined can also have not weak combat power.

It stands to reason that Ye Tian has to be careful when the seven Supreme Dao Void Demons are besieged, but he doesn't care at all, and he still fights for his life.

Rumble!!!!

A Sixfold Supreme Dao Realm Void Demon was directly killed by Ye Tian, but he also suffered from the attacks of the other six Supreme Dao Void Demons.

Soon, another Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon was killed by Ye Tian.

These Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons seem to be powerful, but in front of Ye Tian, they are all ants, and they only have the effect of restraining them.

Xuepeng watched Ye Tian fight for his life with injuries and kill one after another Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, he was also completely panicked, and he began to flee, but Ye Tian kept chasing and killing.
